title: APM Spec Guardian - Synthesizer Return Shape (advisory regime)
description: Shape the spec-editor-synthesizer MUST return when invoked by the apm-spec-guardian skill. Mirrors the structure of SPEC_BRIEF_v2 (ship decision + convergence evidence + fold-now + defer-v0.1.1 + defer-v0.2 + reject). The synthesizer does NOT pick a binary verdict; the panel is advisory. The orchestrator renders these fields into the comment template.

shocked_meter_avg.description: Arithmetic mean of the four panelists' shocked_meter values. Used for the ship-meter floor (>=7.0 required for fold_and_ship).

convergence_table.description: One row per panelist (4 panels exactly). Used to render the top-of-comment convergence summary table.

convergent_themes.description: Themes independently flagged by 2 or more panels. Up to 6 themes. Each cites the supporting findings.

fold_now.description: Surgical, single-section fixes the drafter can fold in one mechanical pass before shipping the PR. Each cites a success criterion the linter (or a follow-up grep) can verify.

defer_v0_1_1.description: Small patches deferred to the next patch release. Same shape as fold_now; success_criterion MAY be looser since the work happens post-merge.

defer_v0_2.description: Architectural work bound to a reserved slot in a future major. Each entry MUST cite the existing reserved-slot section anchor in the artifact (e.g. 'sec.4.8 workspaces reserved', 'sec.10.12 publisher attestations reserved').

reserved_slot_anchor.description: Section / anchor in the current artifact that already reserves space for this work.

reject.description: Findings the synthesizer declines, with rationale. Common reject reasons: out-of-scope for v0.1 lineage; would add a forbidden vendor / foundation token; duplicates a closed round-1 reject; re-litigates a settled decision without new evidence.

ship_decision.description: Advisory ship recommendation. NEVER auto-applied as a label or verdict. Decision rules: (1) if sum of panelist new_blocking_findings across all panels > 0, MUST be 'next_brief'; (2) else if shocked_meter_avg < 7.0, MUST be 'needs_revision'; (3) else MAY be 'fold_and_ship'.

ship_prose.description: One to two paragraphs naming the recommended next action, the highest-signal follow-up to track, and (if applicable) why the loop budget is exhausted. Plain markdown, ASCII only.

linter_handoff_notes.description: Anything Wave 5 (linter) must specifically verify after the fold (e.g. 'After F1 + F8 + F9 land, re-grep req-XXX count and reconcile sec.1.3 + Appendix C + Appendix D'). Empty string if no special handoff needed.

theme.description: Convergent-theme id this fold addresses (e.g. T1, T2), or 'standalone' if not part of a clustered theme.

spec_section.description: Section / appendix / req-XXX anchor where the patch lands.

patch_instruction.description: Concrete mechanical instruction the drafter applies. ASCII only. MUST NOT add any forbidden vendor / foundation token to the artifact.

success_criterion.description: Verifiable post-fold check (grep, schema validation, or anchor count).
